AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.subtitle: Discover the engineering mindset, architectural choices, and technical drive that shape every web application I build.

aboutMe.label: About Me
aboutMe.heading: I'm LocT, a detail-oriented Front-end Developer dedicated to architecting scalable systems and delivering ultra-smooth digital experiences.
aboutMe.description: Every project I take on is rooted in performance and clean code. With a background in 2D Animation and deep expertise in Next.js and Micro-frontends, I bridge the gap between complex logic and fluid UI/UX. I bring robust architecture, state management optimization, and pixel-perfect design to the table.

jobs.desc: Led Frontend architecture for 4+ key Next.js projects. Optimized UI/UX workflows and utilized AI Agents to accelerate MVP deployment by 80%.
Designed and produced motion graphics and character animations for various projects. Maintained a 100% positive client rating on Upwork through effective communication.
Graduated with Excellence. Built a strong foundation in algorithmic thinking, data structures, and software systems development.

value.label: Core Values
value.heading: Why work with me?
value.description: More than just writing code—here is the engineering mindset and strategic value I bring to every project.

1.title: Scalable Architecture
1.desc: I approach development with a focus on robust architectures, ensuring the codebase is scalable, maintainable, and independent.

2.title: Collaborative Workflow
2.desc: Bridging the gap between BA, Designers, and logic. I maintain a 100% client satisfaction rate through transparent, proactive communication and problem-solving.

3.title: Performance-Driven UX
3.desc: Combining a deep understanding of mobile UI/UX with hardcore optimization (DOM Pooling, RAF) to deliver fluid applications and ultra-fast load times.

4.title: AI-Accelerated Delivery
4.desc: Leveraging advanced AI Agents (Claude, Copilot,etc) to accelerate MVP development, saving up to 80% of coding time while maintaining high code quality standards.
